description: Sprite generation manifest for Ingnomia. Each entry defines a sprite or sprite group to generate.

global_settings.style: chunky voxel-like pixel art, earthy muted palette, transparent background

sprites.prompt: pixelsprite, isometric stone wall block, gray granite texture, chunky voxel style, game asset, transparent background
sprites.negative_prompt: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, text, watermark
sprites.notes: Will be tinted by material color at runtime

sprites.prompt: pixelsprite, isometric stone floor tile, flat top surface, gray, chunky voxel style, game asset, transparent background
sprites.negative_prompt: blurry, smooth, realistic, 3d render, text, watermark
sprites.notes: Floor tile seen from above at isometric angle
